title: Certifications | Purbachal Apparel Limited
meta_desc: Purbachal Apparel Limited holds 12 international certifications including OEKO-TEX, GOTS, SEDEX, WRAP, ISO 14001, EcoVadis and more.
hero_desc: We hold 12 internationally recognized certifications, ensuring that our production processes meet the highest ethical, environmental, and quality standards.

pillars.title: Social Compliance
pillars.text: We adhere to the highest social compliance standards, ensuring fair wages, safe working conditions, and zero tolerance for forced or child labor across our entire supply chain.

pillars.title: Environmental Standards
pillars.text: Our ISO 14001 certification and ongoing sustainability initiatives demonstrate our commitment to minimizing environmental impact through responsible manufacturing practices.

pillars.title: Product Safety
pillars.text: OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certification ensures that every fabric and finished garment we produce is tested for harmful substances and safe for all users.

csr_cards.title: Worker Welfare Programs
csr_cards.text: Regular health check-ups, skills training, and welfare benefits for all workers.

csr_cards.title: Environmental Initiatives
csr_cards.text: Solar energy adoption, water recycling, and waste reduction programs.

csr_cards.title: Community Development
csr_cards.text: Supporting local education, healthcare, and economic development in Gazipur.
